name: Model Evaluation & Validation
description: Model evaluation estimates generalization rather than training fit: metrics are chosen by task (precision/recall for classification, RMSE/R-squared for regression), k-fold cross-validation gives mean and variance of performance, the bias-variance regime is diagnosed, and a final held-out test confirms the model generalizes before acceptance.
mermaid:
graph TD
    N1["Trained model + test set"]
    N2{"Choose metric (task)"}
    N3["Classification: P/R/F1"]
    N4["Regression: RMSE/R^2"]
    N5["K-fold cross-validation"]
    N6["Compute mean + variance"]
    N7{"High bias or variance?"}
    N8["Diagnose under/overfit"]
    N9["Check on held-out test"]
    N10{"Generalization ok?"}
    N11["Validated model"]

    N1 --> N2
    N2 -->|classification| N3
    N2 -->|regression| N4
    N3 --> N5
    N4 --> N5
    N5 --> N6
    N6 --> N7
    N7 -->|yes| N8
    N7 -->|no| N9
    N8 --> N9
    N9 --> N10
    N10 -->|no| N8
    N10 -->|yes| N11

    style N1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style N2 fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff
    style N3 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff

sources.authors: Hastie, T.; Tibshirani, R.; Friedman, J.

sources.title: A study of cross-validation and bootstrap for accuracy estimation and model selection
sources.journal: International Joint Conference on Artificial Intelligence
